Alfredo muy responsable y atento, se nota la capacitacion y la vocación. Super recomendable. 10/10

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and advice at Boxes. They answered all my questions, and the scan report was very comprehensive.
Alfredo was very responsible and attentive; his training and dedication are evident. Highly recommended. 10/10

reviews.comment:
Llevo haciendo los controles anuales de mi vehículo con Alfredo de YPF (ACA-Formosa).  La atención es óptima en cuanto al acompañamiento y asesoramiento junto a la calidad de su trabajo. Regreso al BOX por la atención y la confianza ganada. Gracias Alfredo por mimar a nuestro autito.

(Translated by Google)
I've been getting my vehicle's annual checkups done by Alfredo at YPF (ACA-Formosa). The service is excellent, from the support and advice to the quality of his work. I keep coming back to his shop because of the great service and the trust I've earned. Thanks, Alfredo, for taking such good care of our car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kbE5tTTBTMloxY0VWYVdWUlBRWEJMTkdSVWMzYxAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre en todo lo que uso de ACA, fue y es una experiencia muy buena y gratificante. Me gusta ir a ACA , a tomar un café o hacer mantenimiento de mí vehículo, etc, queda impecable y con muchos detalles de un buen cuidado,  Alfredo es excelente. La atención en los seguros lo mismo. En todo ACA es 100/100. Gracias!

(Translated by Google)
Everything I do at ACA has always been a very good and rewarding experience. I enjoy going to ACA, whether for a coffee or to get my car serviced, etc. It always comes out spotless, with attention to detail and great care. Alfredo is excellent. The service at the insurance counter is equally impressive. ACA is 100/100 in every way. Thank you!

Excelente el servicio del ACA BOXES, destaco la atención de los profesionales como Alfredo, realizan un excelente trabajo,  pude hacer escaneo y revisiones completas. Es un placer ser atendida por gente con vocación y compromiso con un trabajo de suma calidad.

(Translated by Google)
The service at ACA BOXES is excellent. I especially want to highlight the attention from professionals like Alfredo; they do an outstanding job. I was able to get a complete scan and inspection. It's a pleasure to be served by people with such dedication and commitment to top-quality work.
